data.title: APT price aims $1.18 resistance breakout by April 2026. Aptos trades at $1.06 post 11.73% surge. MACD signals weakening momentum.
data.description: The stock of Aptos is currently trading at $1.06 following a significant 11.73% increase in its daily value. Analysts conducting technical analysis predict a potential rise to a resistance level of $1.18. However, caution is advised as the MACD indicator indicates a possible decrease in momentum in the near future.

data.title: Partillion Bioscience Advances a New Era of Cell-Cell Interaction Mapping at the 2026 Cell-Cell Symposium
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 24, 2026, Partillion Bioscience was featured at the 2026 Cell-Cell Symposium at UCLA for its contributions to the advancement of cell-cell interaction mapping. Joe de Rutte, the CEO of Partillion Bioscience, showcased the company's Cell-Cell-seq workflow during the event. This innovation is part of a new era in mapping cell-cell interactions, offering a significant leap in understanding cellular communication. The presentation emphasized the impact of Partillion Bioscience in this field.

data.title: Primrose Schools® Introduces The Primrose Friends Live Through New Creative Collaboration with Dad's Garage Theatre Company
data.description: A new engaging and live performance targeting children will be held from March 14 to April 18 on Saturdays in the wider metro Atlanta region at Dad's Garage Theatre Company. The event is in collaboration with Primrose Schools®, a prominent figure in early education and care. The show promises an interactive experience for young audiences, showcasing learning and entertainment. This initiative marks the latest effort by Primrose Schools® to engage with children, with the event taking place in Atlanta from March 24, 2026.

data.title: FlixBus Reports Strong Early Demand for World Cup Travel
data.description: Excitement is mounting as soccer enthusiasts gear up for multi-city journeys across North America, highlighting the Northeast as a prominent travel route. With the upcoming World Cup set to be the largest in history, preliminary booking information from FlixBus, the continent's rapidly expanding travel network, reveals emerging travel trends.

data.title: KB Home Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, March 24. Analysts are predicting earnings of 54 cents per share, a decrease from $1.49 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $1.09 billion, down from $1.39 billion in the previous year. Recently, Robert McGibney was appointed as president and CEO. KB Home's shares closed at $53.19, marking a 4% increase. For more information on analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where data can be sorted by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other metrics. Explore how Benzinga's top analysts have been rating the company in the latest updates.

data.title: EpiFrontier Therapeutics Secures up to $32M Grant from the Japan Agency for Medical Research and Development to Advance Novel Therapy for Beta Globin Disorders
data.description: Financial backing has been secured to advance the clinical progress of EPF-001, an innovative G9a inhibitor designed for the treatment of sickle cell disease and beta thalassemia. The company, founded on groundbreaking research conducted at RIKEN and Tokyo University of Pharmacy and Life Sciences, has received support from a prominent Japanese venture capital firm. This funding will aid in further developing the drug candidate, which shows promise in addressing these blood disorders affecting millions worldwide.

data.title: Sonepar Sets New Records in 2025 with $37.9 billion Sales and Market Leadership
data.description: The global electrification trend is creating promising prospects for Sonepar, with significant growth observed in pivotal sectors like industrial automation, energy storage, grid modernization, infrastructure upgrades, and the fast-growing data center industry. This surge in electrification is fueling opportunities for Sonepar across various markets worldwide.

data.title: 3 E Network Appoints Mr. Siyang Hu as Vice President to Strengthen Technology Leadership
data.description: A new VP has been named at 3E Network (NASDAQ: MASK). Siyang Hu, who has over two decades of experience in semiconductor and IC design from renowned companies such as Samsung, will be taking on the role.

data.title: Ocugen Announces Topline 12-month Data from Phase 2 ArMaDa Clinical Trial Evaluating OCU410 Modifier Gene Therapy for Geographic Atrophy Secondary to Dry Age-Related Macular Degeneration
data.description: Ocugen, a leading biotechnology company, released encouraging results from the Phase 2 ArMaDa clinical trial of OCU410 for geographic atrophy (GA) due to dry age-related macular degeneration (dAMD). The trial showcased positive 12-month data for the novel modifier gene therapy AAV5-RORA. With approximately 266 million individuals globally affected by dAMD, GA specifically impacts around 2-3 million individuals in the United States and Europe. As the population ages, these numbers are anticipated to rise significantly.

data.title: NanoXplore Publishes Its First Sustainability Report
data.description: In Montreal, Quebec, on March 24, 2026, NanoXplore Inc. released its inaugural Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2025. NanoXplore, a prominent graphene corporation listed on TSX under GRA and OTCQX under NNXPF, celebrated the milestone.

data.title: NEAR Protocol at $1.30, RSI neutral at 51.26. Technicals hint at $1.45 potential by April if $1.35 reclaimed soon.
data.description: The current trading price of NEAR Protocol stands at $1.30, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) sitting at 51.26. Through technical analysis, it has been indicated that there is a possibility of a breakout towards the $1.45 resistance level if the bulls manage to regain control above the $1.35 mark in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: WuXi Biologics Reports Record 2025 Annual Results
data.description: Revenue saw a significant annual growth of 16.7%, reaching RMB 21.8 billion. Revenue from continuous operations also experienced a robust over 20% year-on-year increase. The IFRS gross profit margin showed a noteworthy expansion to 46.0%, surging by 500 basis points compared to the previous year. Additionally, the adjusted gross profit margin saw an increase to 48.8%, marking a 340 basis points growth year-on-year. EBITDA climbed by 38.1% compared to the previous year. Moreover, the IFRS net profit exhibited a substantial growth of 45.3% year-on-year.

data.title: Virtuix Inc. makes Fast Company’s 2026 list of most innovative companies worldwide.
data.description: A recent report shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.5%. The number of job openings has also increased by 15% compared to last quarter, with over 1.5 million positions currently available across various industries. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a slight increase of 2.5%, reaching $25.50. These positive indicators in the labor market suggest a strengthening economy and improved job prospects for individuals seeking employment opportunities.

data.title: Argus launches new global crude tanker index
data.description: Improved transparency has been introduced in shipping markets amidst a sharp increase in rates due to the Iran crisis. On March 24, 2026, the renowned energy and commodity price reporting agency Argus revealed the launch of the Argus Crude Tanker Index (ACTI). This composite index aims to offer a comprehensive overview of the expenses borne by shippers in transporting crude oil. The move comes at a critical time as rates continue to surge.
